Name: Zafeirios Fountas
Specialty: Episodic memory in LLMs; computational neuroscience
Direct relevance to MELM: Lead author of EM-LLM (arXiv:2407.09450) — the architecture we drop in as Layer 3. Direct stake in seeing his work productized.
Approach angle: Cold email with concrete proposal: 'we're building the first end-to-end model around EM-LLM — would you advise / collaborate on the EP design?'
Realistic role: Technical advisor or part-time research collaborator

Name: Haris Jabbar
Direct relevance to MELM: Author of MorphPiece (arXiv:2307.07262) — closest published precedent for our Layer 1 design. Has thought through all the integration questions.
Approach angle: Email with the design and ask for review of our morpheme-FST + Tree-LSTM composition

Name: Aaron Mueller
Direct relevance to MELM: Co-organizer of BabyLM Challenge 2023/2024/2025. Knows the corpus and evaluation suite better than anyone outside the inner circle.

Direct relevance to MELM: BabyLM co-organizer; published on what works at sub-100M-word scale; BLiMP author.
